title: Rule Definition
description: Schema for a single construction compliance rule as evaluated by the GCP mirror rules engine. Each rule specifies a condition to test against a normalized detail record, along with severity, applicability criteria, and remediation guidance.

rule_version.description: Semantic version of this rule definition.

description.description: Detailed explanation of what this rule checks and why.

category.description: Rule category for grouping and filtering.

severity.description: Severity level if the rule is violated.

applicable_disciplines.description: Engineering disciplines this rule applies to.

applicable_element_types.description: Element primary_types this rule applies to. Empty means all types.

jurisdiction_refs.description: Building code references that mandate this rule.

expression.description: The evaluation expression in rule engine syntax.

message_template.description: Template for the violation message using {field_path} syntax.

remediation.description: Suggested corrective action if the rule is violated.

superseded_by.description: Rule ID of the replacement rule, if deprecated.
